name: papermc-despawned-items-ci
description: CI-only dependencies for the in-game (Mineflayer) smoke test and the automated release screenshots. Not part of the plugin jar — see .github/workflows/ci.yml, scripts/ingame-smoke.mjs and scripts/screenshots.mjs.
comment_canvas: prismarine-viewer's server side requires node-canvas to build the texture atlas but declares it only as an optional peer, so `npm ci` without it fails at runtime with "Cannot find module 'canvas'" (caught by the first screenshots CI run, 2026-07-22). Pinned explicitly; the screenshots job also installs the cairo/pango system libs in case no prebuilt binary matches the runner.
comment_overrides: Force the uuid transitive dep >= 11.1.1 to clear GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq (buffer bounds check). CI-only smoke dep, never in the plugin jar, but kept clean per the no-parked-findings bar.
